deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42-62K. Close May 1, 2026. CMA: 31 comps, avg $207K. Est value $266K. 4bed/3bath, 2039 sqft, built 2009.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Build property analysis sheet. Lock template for future deals.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for building property analysis tool.

deals.title: Borregas Land
deals.notes: Land/acreage, development potential. Referred by Ball sisters. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development ($150K offer). Title defect: missing exhibits from 2010 partition deed. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Discuss Isaac development offer formally. Connect Isaac with Josh LT for potential partnership.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Follow up with prior buyers/agents. Isaac development: 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball (co-owner) hired attorney Van Hutchins. Title defect confirmed - Deed #20100079485 missing exhibits C & F. Correction deed being prepared.
Isaac offered ~$150K. Sisters enthusiastic about development angle. Need formal offer discussion once Isaac confirms project details.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 208 DOM, underwater ~$93-143K. VA loan, $489.5K payoff, ~$493K today. Market value $350-400K. Double-carrying: Devine rental + Pearl Brewery apartment. Chandler laid off - strong hardship for short sale. Sellers leaning toward Path A.
deals.next: Talk to broker - short sale protocol. Call Matt/Chandler with three paths. If Path A: start Newrez short sale packet and hardship letter.

logs.m: Call completed 11am. Chandler laid off - strong hardship documentation. Sellers leaning toward short sale. Short sale client email drafted. Debrief Lauren on Newrez packet requirements.
Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis: comps $350-400K. Option 3: drop to $518,999 (direct comp). Commission negotiation offered.
Stopped by property, put mail in house. Landscaper stopping by. Still need showing agent feedback from May 5.
Gilberto buyers wishy-washy, seller finance likely dead. Potential short sale situation. Need honest price adjustment conversation.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce sale. 3bed/2bath, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Pearsall ISD. Payoff ~$257K (Feb 2026). CMA: thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles. Recommended list: $295K. Colton looking for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Schedule professional photos and get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 (Feb). CMA pulled. Built listing presentation with interactive net sheet.
Prior clients - helped with original VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce - need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3bed/2.5bath, referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers moving to NC second week of June (motivated). Asking $250-270K. Payoff ~$170K (verify). Hairline crack in foundation - flag for inspection. Listed $259,900. First showing May 14 - Filipino buyers, cultural concern about direction.
deals.next: Monitor showing feedback. Get roof insurance decision. Follow up on investor cash offer ($176,300). Track 4th showing May 23.

logs.m: Texted Jose/Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300 - kept conversation open. 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30pm.
MLS live. First showing feedback from MK - cultural concern about direction, insufficient sqft mentioned. Roof adjuster completed May 11. Emailed updates to MK and sellers.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.
Listing consultation 11am with Isaac and Jose/Katherine. Meeting went well. CMA recommended $259,900.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash sale $152K. Military buyer via Exquisite SA (Sam VanDenheuvel). Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Closed/funded Apr 26-27.
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift basket/rug/trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank you basket for Michael (notary) and UPS Store staff.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Transaction complete.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Release delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store. Thank you basket planned.
Called Fabian Cerrillo (lien holder family) - understanding and willing to work with us.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO, Priority Bank FSB. Cleanup/remodel in progress by Matt Toney/SA Remodelers. Dumpsters on site. Utilities: Medina Electric (866-632-3532) - transformer # needed. Water: EMCSUD (830-709-3879). Colton Brown considered for contractor work.
deals.next: Get transformer # on-site tomorrow. Submit Medina Electric application. Get water confirmation from EMCSUD. Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler/Ray Stidham. Follow up with Marc (plumber) on quote.

logs.m: Cleanup active, floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utilities confirmed. Email sent to Kelly. Listing paperwork needed for Priority Bank.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). NEW LEAD: Bryce's wife is active military, VA buyer opportunity.
Met Matt Toney in office. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler. Work starts by next Monday.
Two estimates received: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T Construction $61,980. Jerry Sadler recommending HouzzPro.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property (A-735 S-46 E L TAYLOR). First offer (Michael Rodriguez/RBFCU) dead - no earnest money. Cleared property complete. Price adjusted to $117,500. Property has feeders, blinds, buildings, conex.
deals.next: When next offer comes in - lead with net after close, not gross price. Keep Steve in loop.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment - MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked: Conex contents, camper, feeders. Commission box correction still needed.
Steve sent new photos. New prospect lady interested in showing tomorrow. Clearing complete, photos posting to social.
Clearing complete. Steve sent photos. First offer dead - RBFCU stalled, no earnest money. Strategy: lead with net after close.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: 1,535 sqft, 3bed/2.5bath, Grace Gardens (Lennar). Rental: $1,595/mo, 12-month lease, no pets, RentSpree screening. New 2025 Lennar home. WiFi + W/D hookup included. HOA transfer fee $450. Brandon Moran connection.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope. Get vinyl signs from Opie. Professional photos needed. Set up sign drop and listing launch.

logs.m: Photos identified as priority before listing goes live. Sign drop today. New logo/rider pending from Opie. Linktree listing link to set up.
All 12 questions answered by Jimbo same day. Listing agreement reviewed. Ready to send Skyslope packet for signatures.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers - need to review. Confirmed rental price target and next steps.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction. Previously paid off debt Jan 7. Pre-approval target Feb 2026. Connected with Zach Schaphorst (MTG Broker) and Erik Williams (Success Lending). Open to new construction with rate buydowns and incentives.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction search platform. Identify builders with no HOA.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing. Pre-approval expected Feb 2026.
Rental being sold, rents going up. 916 Marriott ruled out - foundation issues, old roof. Pivoted to new construction. Receptive to rate buydowns.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor - buy box unknown. Area of interest likely Schertz. Full intake still needed. Currently interested in Borregas development project.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call - buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold). Add to Bold Trail.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in area. No further details yet.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden community/Little Red House. Grief healing plants story. Real estate potential - trust-based, long-term. Potential content collaboration (with permission).
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story. Keep nurturing - no rush on real estate.

logs.m: Connected through garden share group. Permission needed for content story about healing through gardens.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Property: 13810 Tangle Tree St. Plans to sell soon but already working with another realtor. ~90% complete, struggling to finish. Open to selling as-is. Community connection from garden event May 9.
leads.next: Follow up - check how finishing work progressing. Offer to promote to network. Stay relational - position as natural next call if current realtor fails.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Has property nearly complete but struggling with finishing. Currently with another agent.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Neighbor behind Miss Pat - deceased was avid gardener. Son now owns house. Probate/inherited property - son may not know what to do. Community connection through Miss Pat. Garden angle is natural bridge.
leads.next: Get son's name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out as neighbor/gardener first. Assess: keeping, renting, or selling?

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor may have passed away. Son now owns house. Previous owner was avid gardener.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 renovation. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info (phone/email). Confirm wife's VA eligibility and branch. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met at 181 CR 7751 on-site. Bryce is contractor. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Warm relationship.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner - downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo. Has buyer interested in fixer property - unique situation. Details pending from May 11 catch-up.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full buyer and property details. Understand financing and work needed. Match to inventory.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Buyer needs fixer property - unique situation. Details pending.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Brandon's mom - Milagros Stringer (210-378-5147, milagrosstringer@gmail.com). Buying new construction in Grace Gardens or similar. Budget $50K down, target $1,000/mo payment. Buyer rep agreement sent but not yet signed. 12-month rental plan then move in from California.
leads.next: Confirm Milagros signed buyer rep. Identify new construction options across all builders. Register Chris as agent on first builder visit. Pull inventory with rate buydown options.

logs.m: Follow up with Milagros - ask Brandon status on timeline and interest level. MI Homes option still in play.
Buyer rep NOT sent yet to Milagros. MI Homes (Frank) found option under $1,200/mo. Multiple builder options in progress.
Buyer rep signed for Brandon. Rental setup docs also in folder (8527 Green Bliss).

priorities.notes: Critical underwater deal. Sellers leaning toward short sale (Path A). Chandler laid off - strong hardship documentation. Need to move quickly on Newrez packet and hardship letter.

followUps.text: Talk to broker - short sale protocol and procedures

Start Newrez short sale packet with hardship letter from sellers
Debrief Lauren on Newrez requirements and timeline

priorities.sub: James Jimbo Stringer - Brandon Moran connection
priorities.notes: Rental listing ready to launch. Listing agreement questions answered by Jimbo. Need vinyl signs, professional photos, and Skyslope packet sent for signatures. Target: list and market actively.

followUps.text: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope and send for Jimbo's signatures
Order vinyl signs from Opie - home for rent + branded sign
Schedule professional photos before listing goes live
Drop sign and launch MLS listing - push to Zillow and rental platforms

priorities.notes: Remodel in progress. Critical: get transformer number on-site tomorrow, submit electric application, confirm water setup. Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler/Ray Stidham at Priority Bank.

followUps.text: Get transformer number on-site tomorrow - submit to Medina Electric
Confirm water service with EMCSUD - callback expected
Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham at Priority Bank
Follow up with Marc (plumber) for final quote and confirm scope

priorities.notes: Buyer rep sent but not yet signed. Budget $50K down, target $1,000/mo payment. Must register Chris as agent on FIRST builder visit. Pull inventory across all builders with rate buydown options.

followUps.text: Confirm Milagros signed buyer rep agreement - follow up with Brandon if needed
Pull new construction inventory across all builders - rates/buydowns/pricing
Call Carlos McLean 210-605-0241 before visit - heads up buyer coming
Register Chris as buyer agent on first builder visit - CRITICAL

priorities.sub: Sellers - listing prep and garden community nurture
priorities.notes: Colton Brown: photos scheduled, payoff letter obtained, listing agreement ready. Christina Shine: follow up on property finishing progress, offer to promote to network. Both are warm community connections needing regular touch.

Text Christina - check on Tangle Tree property finishing progress
Check in with Sallie Mae - ask permission for content story collaboration
